content:
### OTel Spans
### Metrics

### Structured Log Events

```
chunking_started         — INFO, file_path + extension + strategy_name
chunking_completed       — INFO, chunks_produced + splits + merges + token_stats
chunking_oversized       — WARN, chunk exceeds budget, triggering split
chunking_fallback        — WARN, no strategy found, using FallbackChunker
```


### ProcessingReport (returned to caller)

```rust
pub struct ProcessingReport {
    pub files_processed: usize,
    pub total_chunks: usize,
    pub chunks_split: usize,
    pub chunks_merged: usize,
    pub token_stats: TokenStats,
    pub per_strategy: HashMap<String, StrategyStats>,
}

pub struct TokenStats {
    pub min: usize,
    pub max: usize,
    pub mean: usize,
    pub median: usize,
}

pub struct StrategyStats {
    pub files: usize,
    pub chunks: usize,
    pub splits: usize,
    pub merges: usize,
}
```
